message:
chore(beads,bd-3aua6): close as duplicate-of-fixed (vxycf / f53df827)

3aua6 was filed as a separate review finding for the same daemon
auto-spawn stale-symlink rejection issue that vxycf tracked and that
f53df827 fixed an hour earlier. Production fix and both regression
tests (stale_socket_cleanup_refuses_to_remove_regular_file +
stale_socket_cleanup_removes_public_socket_symlink) are already in
src/daemon/client.rs on main. No additional code change needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
